codeReview.summary: The synthesis document thoroughly satisfies all validation contract requirements for test analysis. It provides comprehensive coverage comparison with specific numbers per package, detailed qualitative evaluation with assertion examples, and declares a clear winner with justification.

summary: PASS. The synthesis-tests-analysis feature successfully produces a comprehensive test analysis document that fulfills all assertions VAL-TEST-001 and VAL-TEST-002. Coverage table by package includes specific numbers (22.1%, 66.7%, 76.7%, 22.0%, 24.1%), delta analysis shows +339 lines net difference, qualitative evaluation covers 4 components (TOON, errors, SQL, output) with specific assertion code examples, and winner is declared (gem 8.5/10 vs main 6.0/10) with quantitative and qualitative justification. The worker followed the analysis-worker skill procedure correctly and used services.yaml commands appropriately.
